articles.title: ISIS-linked women willing to take the 'hit' of arrests for their kids' freedom
articles.summary: ISIS-linked women willing to take the 'hit' of arrests for their kids' freedom. When a group of so-called "ISIS brides" boarded a flight from Doha to Melbourne, they took a leap of faith, unsure of what fate awaited them at the end of their journey. But they said they were willing to face arrest for the freedom of their children.
